{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165336DC49B817F89C02F83EA5"}"},"total":374},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7030765149741630221","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩，详细的介绍了唐朝时代人物背景和发生的历史性时刻，描述其人物所发生的心里活动。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1636977579,"group_id":"6983297848636869646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"你的声音是我最喜欢的音律","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5CzisPMjZHb85sTCpR/SzvbFfgAtxtXbmUffGe3jCNq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528048&x-signature=lJXJWxMJlPQ4kLKophYWoYhmpaE%3D","user_id":"3325381855946071","user_name":"你是我心里最亮的星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3325381855946071","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1665540893,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297848636869646","book_info":{"abstract":"比《唐书》有趣，比《资治通鉴》通俗，比《隋唐演义》靠谱，一部令人上瘾的300年大唐全史。了解唐朝历史，读这套就够了！知名读书节目《罗辑思维》推荐！
唐朝是一个令后人无比向往的伟大朝代，但它近300年错综复杂的历史，也让人望而却步——正史《唐书》《资治通鉴》不但卷帙浩繁，读起来也晦涩难懂；小说《隋唐演义》虽然通俗易懂，但大量人物情节纯属虚构。
知名畅销书作家王觉仁，凭借深厚的唐史功底，以幽默生动的文笔，创作出比《唐书》通俗，比《资治通鉴》有趣，比《隋唐演义》靠谱的《大唐兴亡三百年》，已成为多数读者了解唐朝历史的选择。翻开本书，领略让你全程上瘾的300年大唐全史。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/d081942243f2050a56a3b71bab8444c1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"王觉仁","author_id":"","book_id":"6983297848636869646","book_name":"大唐兴亡三百年（全七册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8b808","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"38.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7542730850513734718","read_count":"5529","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1502378"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"70","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/d081942243f2050a56a3b71bab8444c1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180816&x-signature=BudiDLF83ZuPXL30zyHnpdfWBGA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"8.7734636e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320165336DC49B817F89C02F83EA5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读24小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":87734,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5079},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7482366381075022654","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"系统展现了唐朝近三百年的历史，尤其是对太宗，玄宗，武则天，安史之乱，藩镇割据这些内容讲解地比较具体，总体来说是一本不错的历史科普读物，另外作者的文笔真的厉害，印象深刻的对武则天杨贵妃几处联想描写的非常生动形象，值得一读！2025.3.16","text_exts":[{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"安史之乱","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AE%89%E5%8F%B2%E4%B9%8B%E4%B9%B1&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399681602F83EA5%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227482366381075022654%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226983297848636869646%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AE%89%E5%8F%B2%E4%B9%8B%E4%B9%B1%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742129015,"group_id":"6983297848636869646","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx47up0eTdbQUXfjxFImQb7U8xYQ1K69cUQZsL6Lf0xd","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/31ea19d0fc464f78a3d0a2d393937afe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536997&x-signature=7xdy1b7wmTtv4dzvLx8eqZXOI4k%3D","user_id":"1471621985238540","user_name":"赵客缦胡缨ve"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1471621985238540","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6983297848636869646","book_info":{"abstract":"比《唐书》有趣，比《资治通鉴》通俗，比《隋唐演义》靠谱，一部令人上瘾的300年大唐全史。了解唐朝历史，读这套就够了！知名读书节目《罗辑思维》推荐！
